candidate.name: Xue Ke
candidate.background: Management PhD (ESG-integrated asset pricing, 2021). Field experience at UN ESCAP Bangkok (Economic and Social Survey of Asia-Pacific) and UNOG Geneva SDG Lab (Building Bridges Week, SDG-aligned investment dialogue). 3+ years designing and delivering executive education to 300+ senior professionals (avg age 40+) across 10+ industries — including building a Business Intelligence curriculum from zero. Trilingual: English (PhD thesis), French (10+ years residence), Chinese (native). Working knowledge of Spanish and Arabic. Holder of French long-stay residence permit — no EU visa sponsorship required. Seeking L&D consultant, international development consultant, or ESG advisory roles. Strongly prefers roles emphasising strategy, communication, and facilitation over technical coding.
candidate.avoid: pure coding, ETL pipelines, software development, roles requiring 10+ years large corporate management experience
